type:ci.description: CI redesign orchestration and implementation work

phases.title: PR Hygiene Foundation
phases.objective: Build corrective PR hygiene automation for metadata normalization, documentation auto-fix support, and Diataxis correction guidance before merge-protection consolidation begins.
workflowScope: documentation header and routing correction foundations
advisory/corrective issue comments for uncertain fixes
phases.rollbackBoundary: Revert only the PR hygiene workflow/script changes and their tests/docs; leave the CI orchestration engine and unrelated gates intact.
postMergeVerification: Confirm post-merge validation passed for the implementation PR.
Confirm queue advancement did not create the next CI implementation issue until the PR closed, merged, and post-merge verification succeeded.
Confirm recent gate runs show no repeated failures for quality, drift, docs, or post-merge detection workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: PR hygiene automation corrects or reports deterministic PR metadata defects without adding brittle merge blockers.
Documentation correction behavior is covered by targeted tests.
No production runtime, website, or Cloudflare behavior changes are introduced.

phases.title: Merge Protection Consolidation
phases.objective: Consolidate deterministic pre-merge blockers into a clearer LGFC merge-protection surface after PR hygiene foundations are stable.
workflowScope: deterministic quality, secret, ZIP, build, test, type, migration, and catastrophic protected-file blockers
phases.rollbackBoundary: Restore the previous merge-protection workflow files and branch-protection documentation only.
postMergeVerification: Confirm required pre-merge checks completed on the implementation PR.
Confirm no required gate was skipped or renamed without documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Blocking pre-merge gates are deterministic and locally attributable to the PR.
Duplicate or timing-sensitive blockers are removed or moved out of merge protection.
Branch-protection documentation matches the as-built check surface.

phases.title: Reviewer Lifecycle Redesign
phases.objective: Move brittle reviewer timing enforcement out of synchronous merge blocking while preserving reviewer evidence and post-merge auditability.
forbiddenScope: merge protection rebuild beyond reviewer workflow integration
phases.rollbackBoundary: Revert reviewer workflow/script changes and reviewer-specific docs/tests.
postMergeVerification: Confirm reviewer post-merge audit runs after merge.
Confirm reviewer timing does not block deterministic merge protection.
Confirm queue advancement pauses on reviewer post-merge audit failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewer lifecycle state is not a brittle synchronous merge blocker.
Reviewer evidence remains available for audit/remediation.
Late reviewer findings pause orchestration through post-merge failure state.

phases.title: Post-Merge Validation Expansion
phases.objective: Expand post-merge validation so implementation completeness, documentation alignment, reviewer audit results, and remediation recommendations are evidence-driven.
phases.rollbackBoundary: Revert post-merge validation and remediation workflow/script changes only.
postMergeVerification: Confirm post-merge validation comments include evidence and failure counts.
Confirm remediation issue creation occurs only when validation fails.
Confirm orchestration pauses on post-merge failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Post-merge checks report implementation evidence from merged code.
Queue advancement remains blocked until validation succeeds.

phases.title: OPS Runtime Consolidation
phases.objective: Consolidate operational monitoring and safe retry foundations for Cloudflare Pages, production route health, D1/B2 checks, snapshots, and rollback evidence.
forbiddenScope: new secret requirements without documented deployment handling
phases.rollbackBoundary: Revert OPS workflow/script consolidation while preserving prior snapshot and audit artifacts.
postMergeVerification: Confirm OPS monitoring workflows report production/runtime health.
Confirm retry behavior is capped and evidence is preserved.
Confirm no Cloudflare runtime contract changed without documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: OPS runtime workflows provide proactive health and retry visibility.
Runtime failures produce evidence and escalation paths.
Cloudflare Pages static export compatibility remains intact.

phases.title: As-built Documentation Update
phases.objective: Record the final CI redesign as built, including implementation variances, deferred items, final workflow inventory, monitoring behavior, and lessons learned.
forbiddenScope: new CI implementation beyond documentation reconciliation
phases.rollbackBoundary: Revert only final CI documentation reconciliation files.
postMergeVerification: Confirm documentation guardrails pass after merge.
Confirm final inventory matches workflow files on main.
Confirm no implementation issue remains open.
acceptanceCriteria: Final docs compare intended design with as-built workflows.
Implementation variances and deferred items are explicit.
Monitoring behavior and operational ownership are documented.
